units.title: Advanced Calculus: Techniques of Integration
units.description: Integration by parts, substitution, partial fractions, and improper integrals

units.title: Differential Equations
units.description: Separable, linear, and second-order ODEs; modeling with differential equations

units.title: Multivariable Calculus
units.description: Partial derivatives, gradient, divergence, curl, and double integrals

units.title: Linear Algebra
units.description: Vector spaces, linear transformations, eigenvalues, and eigenvectors

units.title: Discrete Mathematics
units.description: Logic, set theory, graph theory, induction, and combinatorics

units.title: Momentum, Impulse, and Collisions
units.description: Conservation of momentum; elastic and inelastic collisions; center of mass

units.title: Modern Physics: Quantum Mechanics
units.description: Photoelectric effect, de Broglie wavelength, Heisenberg uncertainty, Schrödinger equation

units.title: Nuclear Physics and Radioactivity
units.description: Radioactive decay, half-life, fission, fusion, and nuclear energy

units.title: Biochemistry
units.description: Proteins, enzymes, DNA, metabolic pathways, and cellular respiration

units.title: Astrophysics
units.description: Stellar evolution, black holes, cosmology, and the Big Bang model

units.title: Machine Learning in Practice
units.description: sklearn pipelines, cross-validation, regularization, and ensemble methods

units.title: Deep Learning and Neural Networks
units.description: CNNs, RNNs, transformers; training pipelines with PyTorch or TensorFlow

units.title: Distributed Systems
units.description: CAP theorem, consensus algorithms, microservices, and event-driven architecture

units.title: Quantum Computing
units.description: Qubits, superposition, entanglement; quantum gates and Grover's algorithm

units.title: Capstone Project: Applied AI
units.description: End-to-end ML project: problem definition, data collection, model, deployment

units.title: Advanced Robotics
units.description: SLAM, path planning, computer vision integration, and ROS introduction

units.title: Aerospace Engineering
units.description: Lift, drag, thrust, weight; airfoil design; rocket propulsion basics

units.title: Biomedical Engineering
units.description: Medical devices, prosthetics, tissue engineering, and ethics in biomedical design

units.title: Capstone Engineering Design
units.description: Full design cycle: requirements, prototyping, testing, and presenting a STEM solution
